description: Add IP addresses or ranges that are authorised to access this share. By default, no IP addresses or ranges are authorised. File Storage can only be used with OVHcloud IPs (Public Cloud, Managed Kubernetes Service).

add.label: Add a new access
add.success: Your ACL (Access Control List) has been added
add.error: An error occurred while adding the ACL: {{errorMessage}}

accessTo.invalidFormat: Invalid format: please enter a valid IP address or IP range (e.g: 10.0.0.0/24

delete.success: Your ACL (Access Control List) has been deleted
delete.error: An error occurred while deleting the ACL: {{errorMessage}}

deleteModal.title: Delete ACL
deleteModal.description: If this ACL is deleted, {{accessTo}} will no longer be able to access the share. Are you sure you want to delete it?
